'''''Halberd''''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]].

==History==
It was stationed near [[Comm Center]] and attempted to save that outpost when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces raided it as part of a secret operation to contact an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Zaletta|defector]]. It arrived around the time when [[Python (Assassin-class)|''Python'']] downloaded the data from Comm Center and launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] against her.

[[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and other [[A-wing]] pilots managed to defend the Corvette from the missiles, until ''Python'' completed the operation.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
